description: A list of dongles connected to the system. The system instance can be found in `licenses.dongles`.

methods.name: refreshDongles
methods.description: Refreshes the list of dongles connected to the system and their product codes.

methods.name: encrypt
methods.description: Encrypts a string or byte array using a CodeMeter dongle with a given firm code and product code installed on it. If successful it returns a byte array with the encrypted data. * firmCode - The firm code to use. It must be present on the dongle. * productCode - The product code to use. It must be present on the dongle. * data - A string or byte array to encrypt. Must be 16 bytes in size at least.

methods.name: decrypt
methods.description: Decrypts a string or byte array using a CodeMeter dongle with a given firm code and product code installed on it. If successful it returns a byte array with the decrypted data. * firmCode - The firm code to use. It must be present on the dongle. * productCode - The product code to use. It must be present on the dongle. * data - A string or byte array to decrypt. Must be 16 bytes in size at least.

methods.name: productCodeInstalled
methods.description: Returns True if the provided product code is installed on any of the connected dongles.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the DongleList Class wiki page
